scene.message: Maki's Mother: All of you!?{nl} Are you all right?!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Ngh...!?{nl} Where is this?!{waitkey}{ret}
{ret}
Mark: You're one to talk -{nl} why are YOU here?!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: Let me explain.{nl} You see...{waitkey}{ret}
{ret}
Reiji: ...{wait_fr:60}We won't let it{nl} end like this. Relax.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Don't worry,{nl} we'll surely find a way!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: A great ship!{waitkey}{ret}
Brown: Bwahahaha!{waitkey}
Maki's Mother: ...Thank you,{nl} everyone...{waitkey}{ret}
Mai's Voice: Sniff... sob...{waitkey}{ret}
{ret}
Maki's Mother: I don't care!{waitkey}{ret}
Nanjo: So it's settled.{nl} Let's go, {ctl0f:1}.
Let's reunite a mother{nl} with her child.{waitkey}{ret}
She's not the type to{nl} die easy, after all...{waitkey}{ret}
Mark: C'mon c'mon,{nl} we gotta hurry or else!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: {ctl07:1}...{wait_fr:88}{nl} Is the way I talk strange?{waitkey}{ret}
Was the old way... better?{nl} {ctl0e:30}{ret}
Elly: I see...{nl} Then I'll speak politely.{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Hurry up!{nl} We must get to the shrine!{waitkey}{ret}
Elly: Hurry up!{nl} Let's get to the shrine!{waitkey}{ret}
Register?{nl} {ctl0e:31}{ret}
